name: Homemade Polish Sausage
recipeIngredient: 5 lbs Pork (not too lean, or you'll have door-stops!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the pork coarsely.
2. Mix the ground pork with the other ingredients.
3. Extrude through a meat grinder on a coarse setting into natural casings, twisting at the desired link size.
4. Store in the freezer; this recipe can be multiplied by 5 if you plan to use the meat grinder extensively.
5. To cook, thaw and pan-fry in a skillet for approximately 15 minutes over medium heat until browned and begins to split open. Use in your favorite recipe.
